zh.Lapley, Staffordshire, England, United K: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾拉普利
zh.lifeSummary: Frances Hill於1610年出生在英國斯塔福爾拉普利。她於1622年2月11日與John Bourne在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾拉普利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她於1627年住在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾。她埋葬在英國斯塔福爾波炳頓。

zh-hans.Lapley, Staffordshire, England, United K: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾拉普利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Frances Hill于1610年出生在英国斯塔福爾拉普利。她于1622年2月11日与John Bourne在英国英格兰斯塔福爾拉普利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她于1627年住在英国英格兰斯塔福爾。她埋葬在英国斯塔福爾波炳頓。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Frances
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Francis .  In the 16th century the two spellings were used indiscriminately for both sexes, the distinction in spelling not being established until the 17th century.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Frances Hill was born in 1610, in Lapley, Staffordshire, England. She married John Bourne on 11 February 1622, in Lapley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She lived in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom in 1627. She was buried in Bobbington, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Frances Hill est née en 1610, à Lapley, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé John Bourne le 11 février 1622, à Lapley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle a vécu à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1627. Elleenterrée à Bobbington, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Frances Hill wurde 1610 in Lapley, Staffordshire, England geboren. Sie hat am 11. Februar 1622 in Lapley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom John Bourne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. 1627 hat sie in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Sie wurde in Bobbington, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Frances Hill è nata il nel 1610 nel Lapley, Staffordshire, England. Lei sposato John Bourne il 11 febbraio 1622, nel Lapley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Vissuto a Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1627. Fu sepolta a Bobbington, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Frances Hillは1610年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアラプリーで生まれた。1622年2月11日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアラプリーでJohn Bourneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1627年にはイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアに住んでいた。彼女はイギリススタフォードシュアイアボビントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Frances Hill(은)는 1610년 영국 스태퍼드실르 라플리에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1622년 2월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 라플리에서 John Bourne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1627년도에 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 살았다. 그녀는 영국 스태퍼드실르 보브빙턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Frances Hill родилась в 1610 г. в местности лапли, стаффордшир, Англия. Она жила в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в 1627 году. Она была похоронена в местности боббингтон, стаффордшир, Англия.
